title: adenoon indicum
intro: Adenoon indicum, also known as the Yellow Bignonia or Adenoon, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Bignoniaceae. This plant is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Adenoon indicum include treating fever, reducing swelling, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Adenoon indicum is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of ointments or creams.
